Flow.description: Pulls from Leads__dmo from SNAP/Control 4 org and writes them to ADI org

formulas.description: Defaults to running user if owner id lookup returns nothing
formulas.name: OwnerOrCurrentUser

Flow.interviewLabel: Data 360 SNAP to ADI Lead Creates {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Data 360 SNAP to ADI Lead Creates
